speaker: speaker2
text: Don't worry . You'll be fine . First of all , put on your seat belt . Adjust the mirrors .

speaker: speaker1
text: You don't think I'll need the seat belt , do you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Of course not . But it's a good habit to put it on every time you drive .

speaker: speaker2
text: Right . Hold the steering wheel with your hands at ten o'clock and two o'clock .
